$comment: D-PP-ELIFDEF-ELIFNDEF (C23 6.10.1) runtime witness: `#elifdef X` == `#elif defined(X)`. FEATURE_A is undefined so `#ifdef FEATURE_A` is a DEAD group; FEATURE_B is defined so `#elifdef FEATURE_B` MUST be TAKEN -> PICK=42 -> identity(42) -> exit 42. THE PRE-FIX SILENT MISCOMPILE: an unrecognized `#elifdef` is silently consumed inside the dead group and control falls to `#else` -> PICK=2 -> exit 2, with NO compile/link error (a clean silent miscompile). PICK reaches identity() as a function argument so the baseline arm keeps a live runtime value (not const-folded), and the release arm runs the shipped pipeline over the same source.
